reviews.comment:
Ocupan el cordón de la vereda Caseros cuando cargan nafta. Un peligro para los peatones que deben bajar a la calle. También ocupan toda la vereda de Caseros con autos mal estacionados, ya los denuncié pero coimean y no pasa nada. Un desastre de comercio.

(Translated by Google)
They occupy the curb of Caseros when they're loading gas. A danger to pedestrians who have to go down to the street. They also occupy the entire sidewalk in Caseros with illegally parked cars. I've already reported them, but they take bribes and nothing happens. A commercial disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOdnJMeFR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, había dos personas para abastecer todos los surtidores y se demoraron muchísimo en atenderme, además de atender a gente que llegó mucho después, cuando ya me tocaba se pusieron a limpiar como si yo no existiera. Fui a comprar una botellita de agua en sus instalaciones y 1) el agua estaba caliente, 2) había una mugre ahí dentro y 3) no me dejaron entrar al baño a pesar de haber pagado $30000 de combustible y $2000 por dos botellitas de agua. Pésima atención.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. There were only two people to operate all the pumps, and they took forever to serve me. They even served people who arrived much later. When it was finally my turn, they started cleaning as if I didn't exist. I went to buy a small bottle of water at their station, and 1) the water was warm, 2) it was filthy, and 3) they wouldn't let me use the restroom even though I had paid $30,000 for fuel and $2,000 for two small bottles of water. Awful service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0eWJ1WnZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0ajhqMmVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia. Llegamos desde La Plata a San Fernando y las señoras del shop no nos permitieron pasan al baño, nos dijeron "solo para clientes y socios". Una vergüenza, sumamente desatentas. Somos una pareja de adultos. Tampoco tenían agua para mate. Nos tuvimos que ir a una axion, muy molestos por la muestra de apatía.

(Translated by Google)
A terrible experience. We arrived in San Fernando from La Plata and the women at the shop wouldn't let us use the restroom, saying "only for customers and members." It was shameful; they were incredibly inattentive. We're an adult couple. They didn't even have hot water for mate. We had to go to an Axion convenience store, very upset by their lack of concern.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROZ2FxSWRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención!!! No hace falta ser socio del ACA para cargar combustible en dicha estación. Asimismo la carga de aire de los neumáticos es gratuito, a diferencias de otras YPF donde te cobran una ficha para utilizarla.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! You don't need to be an ACA member to fill up at this station. Also, tire inflation is free, unlike other YPF stations where they charge a token.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxMWJQS1J3EAE
